scripts.bus:stop: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$procs = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter \"Name='node.exe'\" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'hub-bus-tools' -or $_.CommandLine -match 'orchestrator\.mjs' }; if (-not $procs) { Write-Host 'No bus processes found.'; exit 0 }; foreach ($p in $procs) { try { Stop-Process -Id $p.ProcessId -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host ('Stopped PID ' + $p.ProcessId) } catch { Write-Host ('gentle stop failed for PID ' + $p.ProcessId) } }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $survivors = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter \"Name='node.exe'\" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'hub-bus-tools' -or $_.CommandLine -match 'orchestrator\.mjs' }; foreach ($p in $survivors) { Stop-Process -Id $p.ProcessId -Force; Write-Host ('Force-stopped PID ' + $p.ProcessId) }"
scripts.worker:health: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$u='https://hub-relay.halkive.workers.dev'; try { Invoke-RestMethod ($u+'/healthz') | ConvertTo-Json -Compress | Write-Host } catch { Write-Host ('healthz FAIL: '+$_.Exception.Message) }; try { Invoke-RestMethod ($u+'/presence') | Out-Null; Write-Host 'presence (no auth) FAIL: expected 401' } catch { $c=$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__; if ($c -eq 401) { Write-Host 'presence (no auth) PASS: 401' } else { Write-Host ('presence (no auth) FAIL: '+$c) } }; if ($env:HUB_API_SECRET) { try { Invoke-RestMethod ($u+'/presence') -Headers @{Authorization=('Bearer '+$env:HUB_API_SECRET)} | ConvertTo-Json -Compress | Write-Host } catch { Write-Host ('presence (auth) FAIL: '+$_.Exception.Message) } } else { Write-Host 'Set HUB_API_SECRET env var to test authenticated presence.' }"
scripts.test:bus: node -e "import('node:fs').then(async ({default:fs})=>{import('node:path').then(async ({default:path})=>{import('node:child_process').then(({spawnSync})=>{const dirs=['hub-bus-tools','hub-cloudflare','hub-bus-panel'];let pass=0,fail=0;for(const d of dirs){if(!fs.existsSync(d))continue;for(const f of fs.readdirSync(d).filter(x=>x.startsWith('__test-')&&x.endsWith('.mjs'))){const p=path.join(d,f);console.log('---',p,'---');const r=spawnSync(process.execPath,[p],{stdio:'inherit'});if(r.status===0){console.log('[PASS]',p);pass++}else{console.log('[FAIL]',p);fail++}}}console.log('===',pass,'passed,',fail,'failed ===');process.exit(fail?1:0)})})})"
